RequestBody.input: Generate an image of Microsoft logo.

output.revised_prompt: A clean, flat vector-style logo inspired by the Microsoft logo: four equal squares arranged in a 2x2 grid with slight gaps between them, colored red (top-left), green (top-right), blue (bottom-left), and yellow (bottom-right), on a white background. Do not include any text, brand name, or trademarked exact logo; make it an original but similar geometric icon.
